title: 1. Adopt the plexus (not pipeline): make all layers co-reactive a
content:
1. Adopt the plexus (not pipeline): make all layers co-reactive around a central state. Add a Meta-Learning/Control layer on top and a World-Knowledge module on the side.
2. Unify representation: use one labeled hypergraph as the substrate; transform via synchronous HRGs; reason over the whole system with category-theoretic composition.
3. Multimodal hub: align text/audio/gesture/iconography in a single semantic space and keep grapheme-safe, bidi-aware indexing; bind every span with stable span_id + offsets.
4. Modes & gates: keep RAW direct; in PUBLIC insert Fact-gate→Safety-gate→Culture-gate; log decisions to an immutable audit ledger.
5. Interface grammar: ship a declarative visualization language (trees, timelines, icon fields, sonic overlays) that reads the hypergraph directly; expose layer toggles and drift budgets.
6. MVP backlog (6 items):
• Schema: span_ref, hypergraph, rhetorical_links, icon_plan, audit_ledger.
• Cross-modal aligner (text↔audio↔emoji/hiero).
• Rhetorical detector set (parallelism, metaphor, stance).
context: From document: That’s an exceptionally strong synthesis — the GROK-response you drafted… — chunk 10 (chunk 10/18)
